failure.symptom: Accounts UI requires Zesty.io backend API for authentication and instance listing. Backend_risk card — cannot run standalone. Bug confirmed via source code: sortSites() uses case-sensitive string comparison (prev[sortBy] < next[sortBy]), causing 'Z' < 'a' alphabetical breaks. Fix adds .toUpperCase() for case-insensitive sort + null value handling.
attempted: Source code analysis of buggy vs fix commit
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Zesty.io 后端 API。Bug 已确认：排序函数缺大小写不敏感处理
